Portfolio Site Notes

Portfolio Site Notes

Deploying Dashboards

ScamWatch (spam-scraper) → Streamlit Community Cloud

  • Free, no credit card, requires public repo
  • Go to https://share.streamlit.io, sign in with GitHub
  • “New app” → select frprado/spam-scraper → main file: dashboard.py
  • Gets a URL like frprado-spam-scraper-dashboard-xxxx.streamlit.app

LingDash (lingdash) → Render (free tier)

  • Free, requires public repo; app sleeps after 15 min inactivity (~30s wake-up)
  • Alternative with no sleep: Hugging Face Spaces (also free)
  • Go to https://render.com, sign in with GitHub
  • “New” → “Web Service” → connect frprado/lingdash
  • Build command: pip install -r requirements.txt
  • Start command: python pipeline/dashboard.py
  • Required code change before deploying: the app.run() call must bind to 0.0.0.0 and read PORT from env: 
    app.run(host="0.0.0.0", port=int(os.environ.get("PORT", 8050)))
  • Gets a URL like lingdash.onrender.com

After deploying

Add live demo links to the portfolio entries in index.md.
